fields.description: Row index (idx) of the Segment Rule Group this condition belongs to. Links condition to its logical group without nested child tables.
fields.label: Rule Group Idx

fields.description: Logical operator to combine with the next condition within the same group
fields.label: Logic

fields.description: Data source to evaluate (e.g., Buyer Profile, Seller Metrics, Marketplace Order)
fields.label: Data Source
fields.options:
Buyer Profile
Seller Metrics
Marketplace Order
Buyer Feedback
Seller Feedback
Customer Grade
Buyer KPI Score Log
Custom

fields.description: Field name from the data source to evaluate
fields.label: Field Name

fields.description: Comparison operator for evaluating the condition
fields.label: Operator
fields.options:
=
!=
>
<
>=
<=
contains
not contains
in
not in
is set
is not set

fields.description: Value to compare against. For 'in' operator, use comma-separated values.
fields.label: Value
